# WebPeel — The Web Data Platform for AI Agents

> Fetch, search, crawl, extract, monitor, screenshot, and research any URL. One API call. 65-98% token savings.

## Capabilities

- **Fetch**: Extract clean markdown from any URL. Auto-handles JS rendering, Cloudflare, CAPTCHAs, and anti-bot protection.
- **Search**: Web search with structured results and AI summaries. Smart search with intent detection for restaurants, products, flights, hotels.
- **Crawl**: Crawl entire sites (up to 100 pages) with dedup and rate limiting. Returns all URLs or full content.
- **Extract**: Schema-based structured data extraction (JSON schema → JSON output). Built-in schemas for product, article, recipe, job, event, and more.
- **Monitor**: Track pages for changes. Returns diffs when content updates. CSS selector support for targeting specific sections.
- **Screenshot**: Full-page screenshots with device emulation (mobile, tablet, desktop). Supports visual diff comparison.
- **Research**: Autonomous research agent that plans queries, fetches multiple sources, synthesizes answers with citations.
- **YouTube**: Full video transcripts with timestamps, 50+ languages supported.
- **PDF**: Extract real text from PDFs — no OCR needed for text-based PDFs.
- **Feed**: RSS/Atom feed discovery and parsing. Auto-discovers feeds from any URL.
- **Act**: Browser automation — click buttons, fill forms, interact with dynamic pages, then extract content.

## API Endpoints

- GET /v1/fetch?url={url} — Fetch and extract content as markdown
- POST /v1/fetch — Fetch with options (render, stealth, actions, extract schema)
- GET /v1/search?q={query} — Web search with structured results
- POST /v1/search/smart — AI-powered smart search with intent detection
- POST /v1/screenshot — Take full-page screenshot (mobile/tablet/desktop)
- POST /v1/answer — Q&A with citations (BYOK)
- POST /v1/agent — Autonomous research agent (BYOK)
- POST /v1/crawl — Crawl a site, returns all pages
- POST /v1/extract — Schema-based structured data extraction
- GET /v1/feed?url={url} — Discover and parse RSS/Atom feeds
- POST /v1/monitor — Watch a URL for changes

## MCP Server

WebPeel includes an MCP server for Claude, Cursor, VS Code, and other AI tools. Install once, use everywhere:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "webpeel": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "webpeel", "mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

### MCP Tools
- **webpeel** — Smart natural-language web tool. Describe what you want in plain English.
- **webpeel_read** — Fetch any URL as clean markdown. Handles web pages, YouTube transcripts, and PDFs.
- **webpeel_see** — Take screenshots. Supports design analysis and visual diff comparison.
- **webpeel_find** — Web search or site map discovery. Pass query= to search, url= to map a domain.
- **webpeel_extract** — Extract structured JSON from any URL. Pass fields or a full JSON schema.
- **webpeel_monitor** — Watch a URL for changes. Returns diffs on subsequent calls.
- **webpeel_act** — Browser automation. Click, type, scroll, then extract content.

## Token Efficiency

WebPeel reduces web content by 65-98% compared to raw HTML, saving massive LLM costs:
- BBC News: 98% reduction (100K → 2,050 tokens)
- Wikipedia: 86% reduction
- Python docs: 65% reduction
- GitHub repos: 80%+ reduction

## 55+ Domain Extractors

Structured data without browser rendering for major sites:
Amazon, Reddit, GitHub, Wikipedia, YouTube, LinkedIn, arXiv, StackOverflow, npm, PyPI, Yelp, Google Maps, Best Buy, Walmart, Target, Etsy, Medium, Substack, IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, Hacker News, Product Hunt, TechCrunch, and 30+ more.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install
npm install webpeel

# Fetch any page
npx webpeel "https://example.com"

# With JS rendering (for SPAs, React apps)
npx webpeel "https://example.com" --render

# Screenshot
npx webpeel "https://example.com" --screenshot

# Search the web
npx webpeel search "best AI frameworks 2024"

# Extract structured data
npx webpeel "https://amazon.com/dp/..." --schema product --json

# API
curl "https://api.webpeel.dev/v1/fetch?url=https://example.com" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY"
```

## Pricing

Free tier: 2,000 fetches/month, no credit card required.

- Free: 2,000 requests/month
- Starter: $9/month — 10,000 requests
- Pro: $49/month — 100,000 requests
- Enterprise: Custom
